overall.description: A cinematic drive through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from an open neon-lit street into a red-lit tunnel and emerging into a large underground plaza. The footage features distinctive Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetics with holographic billboards, wet reflective asphalt, and dense atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy downtown street with art deco architecture

events.description: approaching and entering the tunnel entrance with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the foggy city street toward a tunnel entrance

entered.detail: tall white building with distinctive tiered architecture and vertical lines
large rectangular billboard displaying red and white vertical stripes
tall street light with bright white lamp illuminating the fog
building entrance with illuminated P parking signs
dark tunnel opening with red accent lighting on the approach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk street at night, driving past an art deco white building on the left and a large red striped billboard on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service tunnel with red emergency lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel transitions from mixed ambient light to dark red artificial lighting
distant billboard becomes visible through the fog at tunnel end

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the narrow tunnel with red lights reflecting off wet walls

entered.detail: horizontal red neon strip lights mounted on concrete tunnel walls
exposed industrial piping and ductwork on tunnel ceiling
red spray-painted graffiti featuring stylized tiger claw marks
large holographic billboard advertising Set Sail with a figure holding a drink

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights on the walls. Industrial pipes run along the ceiling while graffiti decorates the walls. Through the fog ahead, a holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel interior with overhead neon strips and advertising

events.description: passing parked vehicles on the right side of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel approaching the Set Sail billboard with red lights reflecting on the wet road

notable_agents.action: parked car sitting stationary on the right side of the tunnel

entered.detail: long horizontal red neon light strips suspended from the tunnel ceiling
dark colored sedan parked against the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the tunnel, the vehicle passes under red neon ceiling strips and parked cars on the right. The Set Sail billboard grows larger ahead, glowing brightly through the fog, while the tunnel walls display various graffiti tags.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel approach to exit with bright opening ahead

events.description: passing directly underneath the Set Sail billboard which temporarily fills the upper frame
approaching tunnel exit reveals brighter ambient light and pink neon signs ahead

agents.ego_description: driving toward the tunnel exit while passing other vehicles, with bright light visible at the end

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with brake lights illuminated, moving slowly toward the exit

entered.detail: bright opening at the end of the tunnel leading to a larger space
large digital billboard with pink text reading WATSON WHORE
tall vertical digital display showing pink neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes underneath the Set Sail billboard and continues toward the tunnel exit. The tunnel opens ahead into a larger space with bright pink digital billboards visible on both sides, while other vehicles navigate the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: large underground plaza with multiple digital billboards

events.description: exiting the narrow tunnel into a wide underground plaza with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: driving into the open plaza area surrounded by massive digital advertisements

entered.detail: high concrete ceiling with rectangular skylights and exposed beams
multiple large digital screens displaying pink and red neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a vast underground plaza with a high ceiling and massive digital billboards. The Watson Whore advertisement dominates the right side while multiple pink neon screens illuminate the left, creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a foggy, neon-lit city street through a claustrophobic industrial tunnel and into a sprawling underground plaza. It begins by gliding past an art deco white building and a red striped billboard, with the wet asphalt reflecting the city lights as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the narrow concrete passage, the environment shifts to a red-lit industrial corridor lined with graffiti and overhead pipes, where a holographic billboard gradually emerges through the haze. The scene then progresses under red neon ceiling strips and past parked cars, moving directly beneath the glowing Set Sail advertisement before the tunnel begins to widen. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the confinement into a vast underground plaza dominated by massive pink digital billboards and the towering Watson Whore advertisement.
